name: Plan-and-Execute Agent
description: A plan-and-execute agent pattern that decomposes complex goals into multi-step plans, executes each step with tools, evaluates results, and replans if needed. Demonstrates structured planning with tool use on Amazon Bedrock AgentCore.

resources.name: AgentCore Runtime
resources.description: Managed container runtime for the plan-execute agent

resources.name: AgentCore Endpoint
resources.description: Public endpoint for invoking the agent

resources.name: IAM Role + 5 Policies
resources.description: Bedrock invoke, ECR pull, CloudWatch logs, CloudWatch metrics, X-Ray tracing

pattern_description: Plan-and-execute pattern. Given a complex goal, the agent creates a multi-step plan, executes each step with tools, and synthesizes results. Use this for tasks that require breaking down into subtasks with sequential dependencies.

parameters.name: container_image_uri
parameters.description: ECR image URI for the agent container
